meaning: n.要求解散托拉斯的人,联邦反托拉斯检查官
examples: At any rate, her successful tenure as Europe's chief trustbuster could end on some jarring notes.
Hubbard was also pals with trustbuster Teddy Roosevelt (both were born in 1856), a fan of Hubbard's writing.
Stewart or New York State Attorney General Eliot Spitzer, trustbuster deluxe, as they righteously seek to banish moneylenders, marketmakers and conflicts of interest from the temples of Wall Street?
